name: yka-code-health
description: Reference implementation of the Claude Code `monitors` manifest key. Polls yka-code harness health (hooks, MCP registrations, primordial assets) and emits notifications on drift.

monitors.name: primordial-install-health
monitors.description: Detect drift in the yka-code primordial install: missing hooks, unregistered MCPs, or removed managed shell-rc blocks.
